message:
chore: refresh Cargo.lock for fsqlite-wal -> dashmap edge

Routine transitive lockfile update following the frankensqlite
sibling-workspace migration to dashmap (pager + wal published-pages
plane).  fsqlite-wal now records a dependency edge on dashmap in
beads_rust's lock graph, picking up the same workspace.dependencies
entry that was added on the frankensqlite side.

No direct dependency manifest changes here; this is purely a
re-resolution of the existing transitive tree.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
